header.offlineSubtitle: Offline editing mode - not linked to any Steam content

draft.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete draft "{{name}}"?
draft.batchDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected drafts?
draft.noReviewDrafts: No review drafts yet. Click "Edit This Review" on a Steam game page to start
draft.emptyContent: Draft content is empty, cannot upload

chapter.pullConfirm: This chapter has not been pulled yet. Pull content from Steam now?
chapter.offlineReorder: Cannot reorder chapters in offline mode. Please refresh to connect to Steam
chapter.syncFail: Failed to sync chapter order to Steam: {{error}}
chapter.offlineCreate: Cannot create new chapters in offline mode. Please refresh to connect to Steam

bbcode.emptyContent: Current chapter is empty, no BBCode to export.
bbcode.invalidFormat: BBCode content could not be recognized. Please check the format and try again.
bbcode.importModeMessage: The editor already has content. Choose how to import.
bbcode.overwriteConfirm: Replace all content in the editor? This cannot be undone.
bbcode.noDraft: Please create or select a draft first.

toolbar.dockSide: Side dock (click to switch to top)
toolbar.dockTop: Top dock (click to switch to floating)
toolbar.dockFloat: Floating mode (click to switch to side)

image.deleteSteamConfirm:
Delete image "{{fileName}}" from Steam server?

This action is irreversible.
image.noTags:
No tags yet
Click the tag icon in the header to create
image.tooLargeBlocked: "{{fileName}}" exceeds Steam 2MB limit ({{size}}MB) and cannot be added to the image pool.
image.offlineBlocked: Cannot add images in offline mode. Please connect to a Steam guide first.
image.reviewBlocked: Image paste is not supported in review mode. Steam reviews do not support image uploads.

tag.noTags: No tags yet, click the button below to create

link.displayText: Display text (leave empty to use the link itself)

review.gameMismatch: This draft is bound to game ({{game}}) which doesn't match the current review page. Please switch to the correct draft
review.selectRating: Please select Recommend or Not Recommended first
review.startInstruction: Click "Edit This Review" on a Steam game page to start, or create a new draft
review.guideInstruction: Please create a new draft first, or pull existing chapters from the chapter navigation
review.draftOnly:
This draft is for reference only and cannot be submitted to Steam.
Only the primary draft imported from Steam can be submitted.

titleEditor.placeholder: Chapter title (supports drag & drop / paste images)

archive.noArchives: No archives yet. Visit a Steam guide or create an offline archive
archive.deleteOfflineConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete offline archive "{{name}}"?

All drafts under this archive will become unlinked.
archive.deleteConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete archive "{{name}}"?

Note: This only deletes the local cache, it won't affect the original guide on Steam. All drafts under this archive will become unlinked.

externalImage.title: Insert External Image
externalImage.hint: Only HTTPS URLs are supported. Steam truncates URLs by a character whitelist — what you see in the preview is what Steam will actually render. Note: external URL availability checks and previews of query-dropped URLs are not guaranteed to match Steam's actual rendering — verify on Steam.
externalImage.steamUnavailable: Steam cannot load this image — insertion blocked
externalImage.steamTruncated: URL contains {{char}}; Steam will truncate to {{truncated}}
externalImage.steamDroppedQuery: Steam will drop query parameters; actual URL: {{truncated}}
externalImage.steamDroppedHash: Steam will drop the # fragment; actual URL: {{truncated}}

eresult.2: Steam server error. Please try again later. For uploads, try converting to a different image format.
eresult.3: Cannot connect to Steam servers. Please check your network connection.
eresult.8: Steam cannot process this image file. Try converting between PNG/JPG format, or re-save the image with a different editor. It may also be a duplicate image.
eresult.10: Steam service is busy. Please try again later.
eresult.11: Unexpected operation state. Please refresh the page and try again.
eresult.15: You don't have permission to edit this content. Please confirm you are the guide author.
eresult.16: Steam request timed out. Please try again later.
eresult.20: Steam service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
eresult.21: Steam login has expired. Please refresh the Steam page to log in again.
eresult.24: Your Steam account has insufficient privileges for this operation. You may need to own the corresponding game.
eresult.25: File may exceed size limits or filename conflicts with an existing file. Try renaming the file.
eresult.29: Steam detected a duplicate upload. Check if the image already exists in your image pool.
eresult.43: Your Steam account has been disabled.
eresult.44: Steam service is in maintenance mode and not accepting content changes.
eresult.73: Your Steam account has been locked. Please contact Steam support.
eresult.79: Steam reported an unexpected error. Try refreshing the page.
eresult.84: Too many requests. Please wait about 120 seconds before trying again.
eresult.86: This content has been deleted and cannot be accessed.
eresult.95: Account resource limit has been reached.
eresult.96: Too many changes on this account. Please try again later.
eresult.108: Too many pending operations. Please wait for them to complete.
eresult.generic: Steam returned error code {{code}}. Please try again or refresh the page.

http.429: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.
http.500: Steam server internal error (HTTP {{status}}). Please try again later.
http.503: Steam service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

bridge.noConnection: Cannot connect to the Steam page. Please make sure the Steam guide editing page is open and refresh it.
bridge.disconnected: Connection to the Steam page has been lost. Please refresh the Steam page.
bridge.portClosed: No response from the Steam page. Please refresh the Steam page.
bridge.noPermission: The extension does not have permission to access Steam pages. Please grant access in extension settings.
bridge.noSteamPage: No open Steam page found. Please open the corresponding page in your browser first.

steamError.unknown: Operation failed. Please refresh the page and try again. If the issue persists, please report it to the developer.

deleteChapterTitle.title: Delete this chapter?
deleteChapterTitle.message: Content of "{{title}}" will be merged into the previous chapter. This is undoable but changes chapter structure.

wholeGuide.partialFail: Partial failure: {{failed}}/{{total}} chapters failed to upload. Check review page.

error.emptyGuide: Guide has no chapters; cannot enter whole-guide mode.

backup.title: Backups & Archives
backup.restoreConfirm: Restoring will overwrite current edits. The current state is auto-backed up first (recoverable from the auto backups list). Continue?
backup.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete archive "{{label}}"? This cannot be undone.
backup.quotaWarn: Local archive storage at {{used}}%, consider deleting old archives
backup.quotaFull: Local archive storage is full, cannot create new archives

sessionConflict.title: This guide is being edited in another tab
sessionConflict.message: Continuing will take over editing; unsaved changes in the other tab may be lost. Take over?
sessionConflict.preempted: Editing access has been taken by another tab. Refresh this page to try again.

tour.skipHint: You can replay the tour anytime from Settings → Help

welcome.title: Welcome to NASGE
welcome.desc:
A WYSIWYG editor for Steam guides & reviews.
Want a quick overview? (~2 min)

mode.title: Mode Selection
mode.desc:
NASGE supports four modes: Online Guide, Online Review, Offline Guide, and Offline Review.
Online Guide requires the guide management page; Online Review requires the game store page.

draft.title: Draft Management
draft.desc:
Drafts are saved automatically and isolated by mode.
Create, rename, delete, and batch-manage drafts.

editor.title: WYSIWYG Editor
editor.desc:
Supports nearly all Steam BBCode formats with pixel-perfect rendering.
The toolbar can dock to the side, top, or float freely.

upload.title: Import, Export & Upload
upload.desc:
Import/export BBCode with roundtrip fidelity.
Once a chapter is linked, the "Upload to Steam" button appears — two-stage confirmation prevents accidental pushes.

basicComplete.title: Basic Tour Complete
basicComplete.desc:
NASGE has many more advanced features: image pool, context menus, live preview, custom shortcuts…
Want to learn more?

chapterNav.title: Chapter Navigation
chapterNav.desc:
View and manage guide chapters.
Drag to reorder, refresh to sync with Steam.
Note: To delete chapters, use the Steam guide management page — this editor does not include destructive operations.

imagePool.title: Image Pool
imagePool.desc:
Automatically loads Steam images.
Paste/drag to add, tag system, batch upload.
Switch to the Screenshots tab to browse and drag in game screenshots.

screenshotTab.title: Game Screenshots
screenshotTab.desc: Switch to the Screenshots tab to browse and drag game screenshots into the editor.

imagePoolManage.title: Image Pool Controls
imagePoolManage.desc:
The image pool floating panel supports:
· Drag to resize and reposition
· Click the bottom bar to collapse/expand
· Fullscreen mode for browsing

settingsGeneral.title: Settings · General
settingsGeneral.desc:
· Language (Chinese / English / Auto)
· Theme (Steam Dark works best by default; more themes may come later)
· Live Preview toggle (real-time Steam rendering on the right)

settingsImages.title: Settings · Images
settingsImages.desc:
· Auto-upload on paste/drag
· Rename prompt on paste/drag
· Items per page and thumbnail size

settingsMenus.title: Settings · Menus
settingsMenus.desc:
Customize four context menus (text selection, blank area, images, image pool):
· Enable/disable entire menus or individual items
· Drag to reorder menu items

settingsShortcuts.title: Settings · Shortcuts
settingsShortcuts.desc:
Customize 12 keyboard shortcuts:
Ctrl+B bold, Ctrl+I italic, Ctrl+1/2/3 headings…
Click a shortcut field and press a new key combination.

advancedComplete.title: Advanced Tour Complete
advancedComplete.desc:
You've explored all the core features of NASGE!
Feel free to open an Issue on GitHub if you have any questions.
Happy creating!

reviewMode.title: Review Mode
reviewMode.desc:
Same editing experience as guides.
Set recommended/not recommended, visibility, language, and other review metadata.

replay.title: Onboarding Tour
replay.replayNote: Replay is purely demonstrative and won't change any settings
